ShapeParticles

Doc ID 0414_WALL_OF_SOUND_ShapeParticles_v1.0.0
Date 2026-04-14
Version 1.0.0
System WOS
Domain wall
Component audio_system
Type legacy-spec
Priority medium
Risk unknown
Status needs-review

Summary: Imported legacy Wall of Sound spec. Needs review.

0414_WALL_OF_SOUND_ShapeParticles_v1.0.0

🎯 Objective

Transform particles into shape-driven entities using SHAPE_LIBRARY.

Goals:

  • Shape-based identity
  • Rotation modes
  • Optional trails
  • Physics compatibility

🧩 Particle Schema

const DEFAULT_PARTICLE = {
  x: 0, y: 0,
  vx: 0, vy: 0,
  shapeId: "circle",
  rotation: 0,
  angularVelocity: 0,
  alignToVelocity: false,
  collidable: true,
  radius: 4,
  mass: 1,
  color: "#ffffff",
  opacity: 0.8,
  trail: [],
  trailEnabled: false,
  trailLength: 10
};

⚙️ Shape Binding

function buildShapeInstance(p) {
  return SHAPE_LIBRARY[p.shapeId](
    { x: p.x, y: p.y },
    p.radius * 2
  );
}

🔁 Rotation

function updateRotation(p, dt) {
  if (p.alignToVelocity) {
    p.rotation = Math.atan2(p.vy, p.vx);
  } else {
    p.rotation += p.angularVelocity * dt;
  }
}

✨ Trails

function updateTrail(p) {
  if (!p.trailEnabled) return;
  p.trail.push({ x: p.x, y: p.y });
  if (p.trail.length > p.trailLength) p.trail.shift();
}

🎨 Rendering

function renderParticle(ctx, p) {
  const segments = buildShapeInstance(p);

  ctx.save();
  ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
  ctx.rotate(p.rotation);

  ctx.strokeStyle = p.color;
  ctx.globalAlpha = p.opacity;

  segments.forEach(segment => {
    ctx.beginPath();
    segment.forEach((pt, i) => {
      const x = pt.x - p.x;
      const y = pt.y - p.y;
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
      else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    });
    ctx.stroke();
  });

  ctx.restore();
}

⚙️ Collision Toggle

state.world.particleCollision = true;

🎛️ UI

Particle Shape: circle | triangle | square
Rotation: off | free | align
Trail: on/off
Collision: on/off

🚀 Implementation Guide

  • Replace particle rendering
  • Add rotation + trail updates
  • Keep physics intact

Expected:

  • expressive particles
  • readable motion
  • identity-driven visuals

Wall of Sound

Shared project memory for the StudioRich audio/visual system. Specs, logs, recovery notes, and local portals live here.
